locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

relations.subject: Southern chestnut-breasted wren
relations.evidence: The southern chestnut-breasted wren is found in central Peru and western Bolivia. It inhabits wet montane forest including cloud forest with abundant epiphytes and moss
